c.d: Number of active users on the app, indicating potential for meeting and keeping up with a wide circle of friends
Specialization in types of social connections such as casual friends, local community, interest-based friends, or serious relationships
Availability of features for live updates, direct messaging, photos, or group interactions to facilitate keeping up with friends
Target age group or specific communities like women, young people, new moms, or athletes
Capability to organize or join real-life events and meetups to strengthen friendships beyond digital interaction
Options to limit friend circles, keep interactions private, or control who sees your content, supporting intimate connections
